title: Settings
description: Profile, clinic, security, team members, OPME suppliers, and treatment stages.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Name and photo shown in the application.
profile.name: Name
profile.imageHint: Optional. Leave blank to remove it.

password.title: Password
password.description: Change the password used to sign in with email and password.
password.hintNoPassword: Accounts created by invite or without a local password cannot use this option until they set a password through the received link.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: Disabling your account ends the session and blocks future logins.
danger.cardHint: Only use this if you are sure. To regain access later, you will need to contact support.
danger.dialogDescription: Confirm that you want to disable your user in this system.
danger.dialogAlertBody: You will lose access to the dashboard immediately after confirming and cannot sign in again with this user until support reactivates the account, if applicable.
danger.genericError: Could not disable the account. Please try again.

members.title: Team
members.removeConfirm: Remove this member from the tenant?
members.removeDialogDescription: Confirm removal of {name} from this tenant. They will lose access to the dashboard in this context.
members.removeDialogAlertBody: Access is revoked right away. To return, a new invite must be sent.

clinic.title: Clinic
clinic.description: Institutional data for the active tenant used across screens and operational settings.
clinic.name: Clinic name
clinic.affiliatedHospitalsHint: Use one line per hospital or a semicolon-separated list.
clinic.editForbidden: Only tenant_admin or super_admin can edit clinic data.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Operational preferences for the active tenant. In this round, the system only persists the flags; real jobs and deliveries remain future work.
notifications.criticalAlertsDescription: Keeps the future delivery of alerts enabled when patients reach critical SLA conditions.
notifications.surgeryRemindersDescription: Keeps operational reminders for surgery-related stages enabled.
notifications.newPatientsDescription: Keeps the preference enabled to notify the team about newly registered patients.
notifications.weeklyReportDescription: Keeps the future delivery of a weekly tenant summary enabled.
notifications.documentDeliveryDescription: Keeps the confirmation preference enabled when a stage document package is dispatched.
notifications.editForbidden: Only tenant_admin or super_admin can edit tenant notifications.

opme.title: OPME suppliers
opme.description: Register and monitor the suppliers available in the tenant.
opme.createForbidden: Only tenant_admin or super_admin can create suppliers.
opme.empty: No suppliers found for the current filters.

invites.title: Invite user
invites.description: Creates the tenant account and sends an email link to set a password.
invites.forbidden: You must be tenant_admin (or super_admin) with an active tenant to send invites.
invites.name: Name

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.name: Tenant name
tenants.listDescription: Enable or disable tenants and choose which context to work in.
tenants.switchDisabledHint: Re-enable the tenant to use this context.
tenants.helpItemContextDesc: Sets the active tenant for your session (UI and APIs). The check icon means this tenant is in use; the arrows switch to another enabled tenant.
tenants.helpItemSwitchDesc: Enables or disables the tenant for the platform. When off, APIs and users cannot use that tenant until you turn it back on.
tenants.helpItemBadgeActiveDesc: Shows which tenant is active in your session right now.
tenants.helpItemBadgeInactiveDesc: Means the tenant was disabled; re-enable it to use it again and show it in the global tenant switcher.
tenants.footer: New tenants are created enabled and context switches to them automatically. Disabling clears that tenant from everyone’s context until re-enabled.
